articles.title: Playboy Partners With The Sandbox to Create MetaMansion
articles.description: Playboy is still relevant, apparently. The Sandbox has partnered with Playboy to create a Playboy-themed social gaming experience.

articles.title: Cardano Sharks Accumulate Nearly 80 Million ADA in Just 30 Days While Whales Stay Flat: Analytics Firm Santiment
articles.description: Blockchain analytics firm Santiment says Cardano sharks have entered into an accumulation phase after a lengthy period of selling activity. According to the firm, sharks, or entities holding between 10,000 and 100,000 ADA, have added over 79 million Cardano worth over $35.5 million to their stacks in the past month. Meanwhile, Santiment highlights that whales, […]

articles.title: Terra crash highlights stablecoin risk to financial stability: ECB
articles.description: A recent ECB report says stablecoins are not practical as a mode of payment and their current form isn't fit for use in the real economy.

articles.title: Analyst Michaël van de Poppe Predicts Sharp Rallies for Cardano, Binance Coin and Two Additional Altcoins
articles.description: A widely followed crypto strategist says he’s expecting to witness bullish continuations for Cardano (ADA), Binance (BNB) and two additional crypto assets. Analyst Michaël van de Poppe tells his 615,800 Twitter followers that smart contract platform Cardano must take out its immediate resistance at $0.47 to ignite the next leg up. “This one is looking […] The post Analyst Michaël van de Poppe Predicts Sharp Rallies for Cardano, Binance Coin and Two Additional Altcoins appeared first on The Daily

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Reverse Gains, Altcoins Dip
articles.description: Bitcoin price failed to clear the USD 22,500 zone and started a fresh decline. It is currently (04:10 UTC) trading near USD 20,500 and is down over 3% in a day, but is still up over 6% in a week. Similarly, most major altcoins trimmed gains. ETH is now trading well below the USD 1,200 zone. XRP is back trading near the USD 0.32 zone. ADA is struggling to stay above the USD 0.45 support...

articles.title: Volumes surge 205% in Axie revival as co-founder claims project is ‘healing’
articles.description: Interest in Axie Infinity appears to be picking up again following the launch of its new NFT land staking feature and ongoing upgrades to the Origin battle game mode.
